ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 No Appearance; Order To Arrest

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Continued For Letter To Apr-30-14 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Application And Application For An Order To Show Cause Re Contempt And Attorneys Fees Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: The following two cases were called together: PTR-12-296136 In the Matter of the Dino Taccini Trust and PTR-12-296137 In the Matter of the Alice Taccini Trust.

Appearances: Eli Coffino-Greenberg for Petitioners.

Mr. Coffino-Greenberg stated that he is arguing the Dino Trust only, not the Alice Trust. Furthermore, he stated that there is no proof of service of the order but that he has email correspondence between Co-Counsel and the Trustee regarding the court order. The Court stated that the ruling is made based on the record and that the tentative ruling is adopted. Mr. Coffino-Greenberg to prepare an order. Mr. Coffino-Greenberg raised the question with regard to the order does not set a deadline for payment of the attorney fees. The Court stated that they have reasonable time to make payment.

In PTR-12-296137 In the Matter of the Alice Taccini Trust, with no oral argument presented, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. Mr. Coffino-Greenberg to prepare an order.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Respondents Notice Of Joint Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Aug-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Matter called with case number PTR-12-296136, The Matter of the Dino Taccini Trust.

Appearances: Gerald Murphy for Sacred Heart Cathedral. Eli Coffino-Greenberg for Aladino De Ranieri, Marcus De Ranieri, and Reno De Ranieri.

The issue of attorney's fees was presented and argued. Mr. Murphy and Mr. Coffino-Greenberg stated that they each had filed supplement declarations. The Court informed Mr. Coffino-Greenberg that it could not consider his declaration due to the fact that it was not served. At the conclusion of argument, the Court awarded Mr. Murphy six hours of attorney's fees and informed Mr. Coffino-Greenberg that it would not be awarding any fees to him at this time. Mr. Coffino-Greenberg stated that he would be serving the supplemental declaration and would ask for fees at a later time.
The Court adopted the tentative ruling issued on June 25, 2013 as modified with regard to the attorney's fees: Petitioners ALADINO DeRANIERI, MARCUS DeRANIERI, RENO DeRANIERI , and Respondent SACRED HEART CAHTEDRAL'S Joint Motion to Enforce Settlement Agreement is hereby Granted. Within five (5) days of entry of the FINAL ORDER Respondent UGO shall comply with the terms of the Settlement Agreement and make the required distributions from THE TACCINI TRUSTS to (a) SHC in the amount of $72,333 (b) DeRANIERIS in the amount of $82,333.00 payable to ALADINO DeRANIERI in the amount of $27,444.34, to MARCUS DeRANIERI IN THE AMOUNT OF $27,444.33, and to RENO DeRANIERI in the amount of $27,444.33 (c) In addition Respondent UGO is to forego any further distribution to himself as beneficiary.
If Respondent UGO fails to comply within five days of the entry of the Court's Final Order, then GREGORY WALKER is to be appointed as elisor to enforce the terms of the Settlement Agreement.
The Court also hereby grants Respondent SACRED HEARTH CATHEDRAL'S motion for attorney's fees as modified. Mr. Murphy is awarded a total of six hours of attorney's fees. No attorney's fees were awarded to Mr. Coffino-Greenberg, Counsel for Petitioners DeRanieris.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Not Present. Not Reported.

Respondents Notice Of Joint Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
